title: euphorbia rigida var. mauretanica
intro: Euphorbia rigida var. mauretanica, also known as the Mauretanian Spurge or Mauretanian Pencil Tree, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Euphorbia rigida var. mauretanica include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the roots or stems in water, resulting in a medicinal tea that is often used to treat a range of ailments.
